meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Vercel Drop
products.tagline: Drop it. It's live.
products.summaryZh: 摔不坏。它活着。
products.descriptionZh: Vercel Drop 让你通过将文件或文件夹拖入浏览器即可完成部署。无需使用 Git、Vercel CLI 或任何本地配置。将项目拖放到 vercel.com/drop，选择团队和项目名称，然后点击部署。Vercel 会创建新项目、上传文件，并直接发布到生产环境，生成一个可分享的实时 URL。整个过程只需几秒钟。
products.description: Vercel Drop lets you deploy a file or folder by dragging it into your browser. You don't need Git, the Vercel CLI, or any local setup. Drop a project onto vercel.com/drop, pick a team and project name, and select Deploy. Vercel will create a new project, upload your files, and publish them straight to production with a live URL you can share. All in a matter of seconds.

products.name: Kimi K2.7 Code
products.tagline: Kimi’s most capable coding model yet
products.summaryZh: Kimi迄今为止最强大的编程模型
products.descriptionZh: Kimi K2.7 Code是Moonshot AI最新推出的以编程为核心的智能体模型，专为长周期软件工程任务设计，支持256K上下文、多步骤工具调用、多模态输入，且推理token消耗较K2.6降低约30%。该模型已在Kimi Code、Kimi API中可用，并以开放权重/代码形式提供。
products.description: Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI’s latest coding-focused agentic model, built for long-horizon software engineering, 256K context, multi-step tool use, multimodal inputs, and around 30% lower reasoning-token usage than K2.6. Available in Kimi Code, Kimi API, and as open weights/code.

products.name: Prometheus by Firecrawl
products.tagline: A Forward Deployed Agent for web data.
products.summaryZh: 面向网页数据的前置部署代理。
products.descriptionZh: Firecrawl 推出的实验性前部署代理，用于采集网页数据。描述你所需的网页数据，它会编写 Firecrawl 代码进行采集。可自行运行，或由我们托管并在页面变化时自动维护。
products.description: An experimental Forward Deployed Agent for web data from Firecrawl. Describe the web data you need and it writes Firecrawl code to collect it. Run it yourself or let us host and automatically maintain it as pages change.

products.name: CakewordAI
products.tagline: Point at anything to learn its name in any language
products.summaryZh: 指向任何物体，即可学习它在任意语言中的名称。
products.descriptionZh: 孩子将相机对准任何物品——杯子、泰迪熊、吉他——Cakeword就会将其裁剪成贴纸，用他们正在学习的语言说出物品名称，并添加到他们的单词库中。100%设备端AI运行。无需账户，无广告，不收集数据。
products.description: Kids point the camera at anything — a cup, a teddy bear, a guitar — and Cakeword cuts it out into a sticker, says its name in the language they're learning, and adds it to their Word Dex. 100% on-device AI. No accounts, no ads, no data collection.

products.name: Avatars in ElevenCreative
products.tagline: A dedicated entry point for talking-head video
products.summaryZh: 专用于人物头部视频的入口
products.descriptionZh: 最佳AI语音，如今有了面孔。只需一段脚本、一个声音和一个虚拟形象，即可在同一个地方创作出工作室级别的说话视频。
products.description: The best AI voices, now with a face. Create studio-grade talking videos from a script, a voice, and an avatar - all in one place.

products.name: Feezza
products.tagline: AI health companion who connects food to how you feel
products.summaryZh: AI健康伴侣，连接饮食与身体感受
products.descriptionZh: Feezza是一款应用，Fiza是其内置的AI伴侣。多数应用只告诉你吃了什么，Fiza则告诉你为什么重要。它能通过烹饪方式检测隐藏热量，利用NIH实时数据库提供药物相互作用警告，覆盖26种慢性病并匹配ADA和AHA临床目标。可生成医生可用的健康报告，预测病情发作，发送紧急警报。识别数周而非仅当天的饮食模式。收录500万+种食物。这是唯一能将饮食与身体感受关联的AI伴侣。
products.description: Feezza is the app. Fiza is your AI companion inside it. Most apps tell you what you ate. Fiza tells you why it matters. Hidden calorie detection from cooking methods. Medication interaction warnings using NIH live database. 26 chronic conditions with ADA and AHA clinical targets. Doctor-ready health reports. Condition flare prediction. Emergency alerts. Pattern recognition across weeks not just today. 5M+ foods. The only AI companion that connects what you eat to how you feel.

products.name: ScrollJail
products.tagline: The AI bouncer that asks 'why?' before you open Instagram
products.summaryZh: AI 门卫：在你打开 Instagram 前先问“为什么”
products.descriptionZh: 每次打开让人分心的应用时，一个AI门卫会拦住你问：你来这里做什么？理由充分：放你进去。理由不充分：请回。没有付费墙，没有内疚感引导。只是一个不让你对自己撒谎的AI。免费iOS快捷指令，3分钟设置。
products.description: Every time you open a distracting app, an AI bouncer stops you and asks: Why are you here? Good reason: you're in. Bad reason: you're not. No paywall, no guilt-trip onboarding. Just an AI that won't let you lie to yourself. Free iOS Shortcut, 3 min setup.

products.name: Carve
products.tagline: Client-ready Architectural renders in 60 seconds
products.summaryZh: 60秒内生成可直接交付客户的建筑渲染图
products.descriptionZh: 将草图、CAD导出文件及房产照片在一分钟内转化为可直接交付给客户的渲染图。专为建筑师、室内设计师及房地产经纪人打造。
products.description: Carve turns sketches, CAD exports, and property photos into client-ready renders in under a minute. Built for architects, interior designers, and real estate agents.

products.name: TiniAid
products.tagline: Noise cancellation for your mind - soundscapes for ADHD
products.summaryZh: 专注思绪的降噪——ADHD专属音景
products.descriptionZh: TiniAid帮助用户为ADHD及神经多样性大脑创建个性化的科技感声音环境，以控制刺激水平并专注于真正重要的事。多数ADHD专注工具依赖计时器、连续打卡、提醒和屏蔽功能，试图强迫你进入专注状态。而TiniAid让你选择情绪（平静、稳定、活跃、强烈），叠加音效，找到与大脑协同而非对抗的节奏。该工具基于声音与ADHD的真实研究构建。
products.description: TiniAid helps users create personalized, techno-inspired sound environments for ADHD and neurodivergent brains to help them control their stimulation level and focus on what really matters. Most ADHD focus tools are timers, streaks, reminders and blockers which tries to force you info focusing. TiniAid lets you pick a mood (Calm, Steady, Active, Intense), layer sounds and find a rhythm that works with your brain and not against it. It is built from real research on sounds and ADHD.

products.name: GameBrain API
products.tagline: Video games database API with 775,000+ games
products.summaryZh: 775,000+ 款游戏的视频游戏数据库 API
products.descriptionZh: GameBrain 是全球最大的电子游戏数据库与发现服务之一。我们的API可提供超过77.5万款游戏、70余个平台的数据，涵盖7.67亿条用户评分、截图、视频、相似游戏推荐、商店优惠、语义搜索以及独特的Game Brain评分。同时支持MCP集成，可将游戏数据接入AI聊天机器人。提供免费套餐。
products.description: GameBrain is one of the largest video game databases and discovery services. Our API gives you access to 775,000+ games across 70+ platforms, with 767M+ user ratings, screenshots, videos, similar games, store offers, semantic search, and a unique Game Brain Score. There's also an MCP integration to connect game data to AI chatbots. Free tier available.

products.name: APIddress — email validation API
products.tagline: The email validation API that shows its work
products.summaryZh: 展示验证过程的电子邮件验证API
products.descriptionZh: APIddress 是一款面向开发者的邮箱验证API：一次请求即可返回完整判定结果——包括语法、域名/MX、临时邮箱、角色邮箱、拼写错误检测及垃圾邮件陷阱风险——以透明的检查对象形式呈现，而非黑盒评分。内测即将开放：在 apiddress.com 申请访问权限，开放后即可获取密钥。内测期间免费使用，无需购买积分包，且永不过期。关注此处以获取公开发布信息。
products.description: APIddress is an email validation API for developers: one request returns the full verdict — syntax, domain/MX, disposable, role-based, typo detection, and spam-trap risk — as a transparent checks object, not a black-box score. The private beta is opening soon : request access at apiddress.com and get a key as soon as it opens. Free during beta, no credit packs, and nothing ever expires. Follow here to catch the public launch.

products.name: GraceKit - Elegant Christian widgets
products.tagline: Christian widgets, daily scriptures & sacred devotional art.
products.summaryZh: 基督教灵修用品、每日经文与神圣灵修艺术。
products.descriptionZh: 为您的设备带来宁静与优雅。获取超过240种自定义排版的圣经经文、每日灵修、祈祷词及古典圣像油画。颜色、字体与尺寸均可自由调整，完美适配您的主屏幕美学。
products.description: Bring peace and grace to your device. Access over 240+ custom-typeset Bible verses, daily devotionals, prayers, and sacred classical oil paintings. Fully customizable colors, fonts, and sizes to fit your home screen aesthetic.

products.name: Praise.page
products.tagline: Quick way to collect product testimonials
products.summaryZh: 快速收集产品评价的方法
products.descriptionZh: PraisePage，将零散的客户好评转化为证明页面的简单方式。大多数客户好评最终都埋没在邮件、私信、Slack消息、截图、通话记录或社交媒体评论中。PraisePage为它们提供了一个整洁的归处：发送收集链接，汇集文字或视频推荐，然后分享托管页面或将评价墙嵌入网站。它专为需要快速建立信任信号的用户打造：独立顾问、自由职业者、创作者、小型服务企业、代理机构以及早期团队。
products.description: PraisePage, a simple way to turn scattered customer praise into a proof page Most client praise ends up buried in emails, DMs, Slack messages, screenshots, call notes, or social comments. PraisePage gives it one clean home: send a collection link, gather text or video testimonials, then share a hosted page or embed the wall on your website. It is built for people who need trust signals quickly: solo consultants, freelancers, creators, small service businesses, agencies, and early-stage teams.

products.name: Next Elite
products.tagline: An open source production-ready Next.js starter kit
products.summaryZh: 一个开源、可用于生产的 Next.js 启动套件
products.descriptionZh: Next Elite 是一款前端优先的 Next.js 样板，专为消费 API（REST/GraphQL/BFF）而设计，无需拥有数据库，可直接部署在任何现有后端之上。它基于功能模块构建，提供精良的开发体验（DX），内置基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）、类型安全的国际化（i18n），并针对速度、SEO 和开发效率进行了优化。
products.description: Next Elite is a frontend-first Next.js boilerplate designed to consume APIs (REST/GraphQL/BFF) instead of owning a database, allowing you to drop it on top of any backend you already have. It is feature-based, offering a polished developer experience (DX), built-in role-based access control (RBAC), type-safe internationalization (i18n), and is optimized for speed, SEO, and developer productivity.

products.name: Excel Error Finder
products.tagline: Find hidden errors in your spreadsheet
products.summaryZh: 发现电子表格中的隐藏错误
products.descriptionZh: Excel Error Finder 是一款免费的浏览器端审计工具，可扫描您的.xlsx/.xls/.xlsm/.xlsb 文件，查找隐藏错误、损坏公式（#REF!、#VALUE!、#DIV/0!）、列中不一致的公式、隐藏/深度隐藏工作表、损坏的外部链接、硬编码的“魔法数字”等问题。每个问题均附带通俗易懂的英文说明，解释其成因及修复方法。
products.description: Excel Error Finder is a free, browser-based audit tool that scans yourxlsx/.xls/.xlsm/.xlsb files for hidden errors broken formulas (#REF!, #VALUE!, #DIV/0!), inconsistent formulas in columns, hidden/very-hidden sheets, broken external links, hardcoded "magic numbers," and more. Every issue comes with a plain-English explanation of what caused it and how to fix it.

products.name: Event Parlour
products.tagline: Events reimagined. Moments that matter
products.summaryZh: 重新定义活动，让每一刻都值得铭记。
products.descriptionZh: 让您的活动触达精准受众。我们为活动组织者与寻找同类体验的活跃参与者建立连接。分发优先，管理同步。
products.description: Get your events in front of the right audience. We connect organizers with active event-goers looking for experiences like yours. Distribution first. Management included.

products.name: NomNak
products.tagline: Find restaurants through people you trust
products.summaryZh: 通过你信任的人找到餐厅
products.descriptionZh: NomNak 帮你通过信任的人找到餐厅。看看朋友们真正去哪里吃，收藏想尝试的店，打造属于你的美食护照，记录你去过的每一个地方。
products.description: NomNak helps you find restaurants through people you trust. See where your friends actually eat, save spots to try, and build a Food Passport of everywhere you’ve been.

products.name: Bail: Fake Call Simulator
products.tagline: Fake calls and alerts for a graceful exit
products.summaryZh: 优雅离场的虚假来电与提醒
products.descriptionZh: Bail 是一款用于营造可信社交脱身场景的 iPhone 应用。你可以在几秒内启动模拟来电、锁屏通知、低电量关机画面、LED 标识或实时房间模拟。它适用于尴尬约会、会议、聚会、演示、角色扮演及隐私练习。Bail 不会拨出真实电话、发送真实信息或联系紧急服务。
products.description: Bail is an iPhone app for creating believable social-exit moments. Start a fake incoming call, lock-screen alert, low-battery shutdown screen, LED sign, or live-room simulation in seconds. It is built for awkward dates, meetings, parties, demos, role-play, and privacy practice. Bail does not place real calls, send real messages, or contact emergency services.

products.name: Nox
products.tagline: A quieter social app built around real moments
products.summaryZh: 围绕真实时刻打造的更安静的社交应用
products.descriptionZh: Nox 是一款更安静的社交应用，围绕瞬间而非受众构建。你可以私下或公开分享想法、照片和短视频。发现功能通过卡片式仪式每天推荐几个人，而非无休止的信息流。对话始于共享的瞬间，而非冰冷的私信。没有粉丝数，没有公开点赞，没有表演压力。只有瞬间、发现和真实的连接。
products.description: Nox is a quieter social app built around moments instead of audiences. Share thoughts, photos, and short videos privately or publicly. Discover introduces a few people each day through a card-based ritual rather than an endless feed. Conversations begin from shared moments, not cold DMs. No follower counts. No public likes. No pressure to perform. Just moments, discovery, and genuine connections.

products.name: audiOS
products.tagline: The voice-only iOS keyboard with tape-deck controls
products.summaryZh: 磁带式控制的纯语音iOS键盘
products.descriptionZh: 为终端、Claude Code、SSH会话及AI编程工具打造的个性化语音转文字iOS键盘，在其他场景下也意外地表现出色。
products.description: opinionated voice-to-text iOS keyboard built for terminals, claude code, SSH sessions, and AI coding tools somehow amazing for everything else too
